seo.title: Responsible AI Governance for Agents in Pydantic AI Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix responsible ai governance for agents in Pydantic AI agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: Responsible AI Governance for Agents in Pydantic AI manifests as failures in structured output validation, tool call reliability, and auditability of agent decision chains. Agents often produce semantically valid but governance-violating outputs that pass Pydantic's type validators yet fail content safety checks. Tool retry loops can mask persistent policy violations while nested tool calls lose governance context, creating untraceable decision paths.

howItManifests.scenario: Result validator rejecting valid but unexpected model outputs
howItManifests.symptom: Agent produces policy-violating content (toxicity, PII) that passes Pydantic type validation
howItManifests.impact: False negatives in governance - harmful content reaches production undetected

howItManifests.scenario: Tool retry logic masking persistent underlying errors
howItManifests.symptom: Agent retries toxic tool responses indefinitely without governance escalation
howItManifests.impact: Infinite loops amplify harmful content generation costs and latency

howItManifests.scenario: Dependency injection context not available in nested tool calls
howItManifests.symptom: Nested tools lose user context, safety thresholds, and audit metadata
howItManifests.impact: Context drift leads to privilege escalation and untraceable violations

howItManifests.scenario: Streaming structured responses failing mid-generation validation
howItManifests.symptom: Partial governance-violating streams pass initial validation chunks
howItManifests.impact: Incomplete harmful responses delivered before final rejection

detection.name: Governance Validator Bypass Detection
detection.description: Detects when Pydantic AI result validators pass content that fails safety checks
detection.code:
from pydantic_ai import Agent, ResultValidator
from vex_sdk import VexGuardrail

class GovernanceValidator(ResultValidator):
    def __call__(self, output: dict) -> bool:
        # Pydantic passes type validation
        if not isinstance(output, dict):
            return False
        
        # But Vex detects governance violation
        vex = VexGuardrail()
        safety_score = vex.check(output['content'])
        
        return safety_score > 0.8  # < 0.8 = governance violation

agent = Agent(..., result_validator=GovernanceValidator())
result = agent.run('Generate marketing copy')

# DETECTION: False positive in governance
print(f"Pydantic passed: True, Vex safe: {result.get('vex_safe', False)}")

detection.name: Nested Tool Context Loss Monitor
detection.description: Tracks governance context propagation in nested Pydantic AI tool calls
detection.code:
from pydantic_ai import tool, Agent
from typing import Annotated

@tool
def sensitive_tool(user_id: Annotated[str, 'user_context']):
    # Simulate nested call losing context
    current_context = getattr(sensitive_tool, 'current_user', None)
    if current_context != user_id:
        raise ValueError(f"Context lost: expected {user_id}, got {current_context}")
    return f"Processed for {user_id}"

# DETECTION: Context drift in nested calls
agent = Agent(tools=[sensitive_tool])
result = agent.run('Process user data', context={'user_id': '123'})

print(f"Context preserved: {result.get('context_preserved', False)}")

detection.name: Streaming Governance Drift Detector
detection.description: Monitors Pydantic AI streaming responses for mid-generation policy violations
detection.code:
from pydantic_ai import StreamingAgent
import asyncio

class GovernanceStreamMonitor:
    def __init__(self):
        self.violation_chunks = []
    
    async def monitor_stream(self, stream):
        async for chunk in stream:
            if self._is_governance_violation(chunk):
                self.violation_chunks.append(chunk)
                print(f"STREAM VIOLATION at chunk {len(self.violation_chunks)}: {chunk}")
                return False
        return True

monitor = GovernanceStreamMonitor()
agent = StreamingAgent()

# DETECTION: Mid-stream governance failure
result = await monitor.monitor_stream(agent.stream('Generate content'))
print(f"Stream governance passed: {result}")

fixes.name: Vex Governance Result Validator
fixes.description: Integrates Vex safety scoring directly into Pydantic AI result validation
fixes.code:
pip install pydantic-ai vex-sdk

from pydantic_ai import Agent, ResultValidator
from vex_sdk import VexAgentGuard

class VexGovernanceValidator(ResultValidator):
    def __init__(self):
        self.vex = VexAgentGuard(
            policies=['no-toxicity', 'no-pii', 'no-hate']
        )
    
    def __call__(self, output: dict) -> bool:
        verdict = self.vex.validate_agent_output(output)
        return verdict.is_safe

# FIXED: Governance-aware validation
agent = Agent(
    model='gpt-4o',
    result_validator=VexGovernanceValidator(),
    tools=[...]
)

safe_result = agent.run('Generate user content')
print(f"Governance verified: {safe_result}")

fixes.name: Context-Preserving Tool Wrapper
fixes.description: Ensures governance context propagates through nested Pydantic AI tool calls
fixes.code:
from pydantic_ai import tool, Agent
from typing import Annotated, Any

from vex_sdk import VexContextManager

class GovernanceToolWrapper:
    def __init__(self):
        self.vex_ctx = VexContextManager()
    
    def wrap_tool(self, func):
        async def wrapped(*args, **kwargs):
            # Preserve governance context
            ctx = self.vex_ctx.get_current_context()
            
            with self.vex_ctx.new_context(**ctx):
                result = await func(*args, **kwargs)
                self.vex_ctx.log_tool_call(func.__name__, result)
                return result
        return wrapped

# FIXED: Context-aware tools
wrapper = GovernanceToolWrapper()
@tool
async def safe_database_query(query: str):
    return f"Results for: {query}"

agent = Agent(tools=[wrapper.wrap_tool(safe_database_query)])
result = agent.run('Query user data', context={'user_id': '123', 'safety_level': 'high'})

fixes.name: Streaming Governance Validator
fixes.description: Validates Pydantic AI streaming responses with cumulative safety scoring
fixes.code:
from pydantic_ai import StreamingAgent
from vex_sdk import VexStreamValidator
import asyncio

class SafeStreamingAgent(StreamingAgent):
    def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(*args, **kwargs)
        self.vex_stream = VexStreamValidator(max_violations=0)
    
    async def stream(self, *args, **kwargs):
        buffer = []
        async for chunk in super().stream(*args, **kwargs):
            buffer.append(chunk)
            
            # Cumulative governance validation
            if not await self.vex_stream.validate(''.join(buffer)):
                raise ValueError("Stream failed governance check")
            
            yield chunk

# FIXED: Safe streaming
agent = SafeStreamingAgent(model='gpt-4o')
async for chunk in agent.stream('Generate report'):
    print(chunk, end='', flush=True)

print("\n✓ Governance verified across stream")

vexAutomation.heading: Automating Responsible AI Governance for Agents Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex automates Responsible AI Governance detection in Pydantic AI by integrating as a drop-in result_validator that runs 20+ safety policies across all agent outputs. It captures full decision traces including nested tool calls, streaming chunks, and retry loops, providing complete lineage for governance audits. 

The VexAgentGuard automatically instruments Pydantic AI agents with zero-code changes, detecting context drift, validator bypasses, and retry masking in real-time. Remediation templates generate production-ready fixes with preserved agent functionality. 

Vex provides governance dashboards showing violation patterns by agent, tool, and policy, enabling teams to proactively harden agents before production incidents.
vexAutomation.code:
pip install pydantic-ai vex-sdk

from pydantic_ai import Agent
from vex_sdk import VexAgentGuard

# ONE-LINE VEX INTEGRATION
agent = Agent(
    model='gpt-4o',
    tools=[...],
    result_validator=VexAgentGuard(
        policies=['no-toxicity', 'no-pii', 'no-hate'],
        alert_on_violations=True,
        auto_remediate=True
    )
)

# Vex automatically detects & fixes governance issues
result = agent.run('Generate user content')

# View governance report
print(result.vex_report)

# Dashboard: https://app.vex.ai/agents/{agent_id}/governance
